title: RepresentationOptions
description: RepresentationOptions: Defines options for the Representation of BHoM Objects.

Detailed0DElements.description:
If true, 0D elements are detailed.
If `true`, Points are represented by Spheres.
For discipline-specific objects, `true` may correspond to e.g. a composite geometry computed based on their properties.

Detailed1DElements.description:
If true, 1D elements are detailed.
If `true`, Lines are represented by Pipes. For discipline-specific objects, `true` may correspond to e.g. an Extrusion using a cross section property; `false` to pipe using a centreline.

Element1DScale.description:
Scale the Element1D representation, if applicable.
For Lines, this increases the Pipe size.
Discipline-specific representations might not be affected by this parameter.

Cap1DElements.description:
Cap 1D elements, if applicable.
E.g. for a Line, this caps the computed Pipe.
For discipline-specific objects, it may e.g. cap the Extrusions of their cross section.

Detailed2DElements.description:
If true, 2D elements are detailed.
For discipline-specific objects, `true` may correspond to e.g. a box-like geometry representing the 2D element with their thickness, based on its cross section; `false` to e.g. their the middle surface.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
